statement.informal: Reciprocal on positive reals is a single F16 node: EPL(−1, x) = exp(−1 · log x) = exp(−log x) = 1/x for x > 0. Same EPL/F13 mechanism that gives sqrt and pow at 1n. (with constant 1 promoted to a parameter k7)
statement.formal_lean:
theorem recip_is_one_node_positive (k7 : ℕ) (x : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) :
    Real.exp ((-k7) * Real.log x) = 1 / x

tactics:
theorem recip_is_one_node_positive (x : ℝ) (hx : 0 < x) :
    Real.exp ((-1) * Real.log x) = 1 / x := by
  rw [show (-1 : ℝ) * Real.log x = -(Real.log x) from by ring,
      Real.exp_neg, Real.exp_log hx, inv_eq_one_div]

metadata.verification_pending: Phase 1.5 — port legacy theorems to MachLib foundations before kernel re-verification.
